Cloud","Private cloud operations software for resilient multi-site virtualization platforms.","Northbridge Cloud builds software and services for **private cloud** and **virtualization operations**.

## What they bring
- Operational tooling for multi-site virtualization estates
- Reference practices for resilience, change control, and day-2 operations
- Integration experience with on-prem infrastructure teams

## Typical outcomes
- Faster rollout of standardized operational patterns
- Clearer ownership boundaries between platform and application teams
- Better repeatability for DR and recovery testing","https://example.com/northbridge-cloud","/api/media?u=http%3A%2F%2F10.1.5.125%3A8080%2Fuploads%2Fnorthbridge_cloud_logo_1ff5e4a0a8.svg",[15,16],[18,19,77],[170,171],{"label":23,"url":165},{"label":172,"url":173},"Integration docs","https://docs.example.com/northbridge-cloud",[175],{"id":176,"documentId":177,"name":178,"slug":179,"solution_type":33,"integration_patterns":34,"licensing_model":35,"description":180,"visibility_level":37,"workflow":38,"createdAt":181,"updatedAt":182,"publishedAt":183,"locale":42,"short_description":184},600,"jj2fay5j4638h72jw77c5raq","Hybrid Disaster Recovery for VMS","hybrid-dr-for-vms","Deliver a repeatable DR capability across multiple Vates VMS sites.

## Scope
- Cross-site replication strategy and target RPO/RTO definition
- Failover and failback workflows with clear ownership boundaries
- Runbook validation cadence and evidence collection

## Integration model
- Agent or appliance-based replication depending on workload class
- Operational hooks for test execution and post-recovery checks

## Best for
- Two-site (or more) deployments needing measurable DR readiness
- Teams that want standardized runbooks and predictable drills

Systems","Capacity optimization and FinOps analytics for virtual infrastructure teams.","Altura Systems focuses on **optimization, analytics, and FinOps workflows** for virtual infrastructure.

## What they bring
- Capacity analytics and rightsizing recommendations
- Utilization reporting and forecasting for platform teams
- Cost governance patterns that align IT and business owners

## Typical outcomes
- Lower waste from overprovisioning
- More predictable capacity planning cycles
- Shared reporting language across infra, ops, and finance","https://example.com/altura-systems","/api/media?u=http%3A%2F%2F10.1.5.125%3A8080%2Fuploads%2Faltura_systems_logo_418f6ccb2d.svg",[15,16],[328,362,20],"Intelligence & Information Management",[364,365],{"label":23,"url":358},{"label":366,"url":367},"Product docs","https://docs.example.com/altura-systems",[369,379],{"id":370,"documentId":371,"name":372,"slug":373,"solution_type":49,"integration_patterns":50,"licensing_model":35,"description":374,"visibility_level":37,"workflow":38,"createdAt":375,"updatedAt":376,"publishedAt":377,"locale":42,"short_description":378},601,"ih7tyfui0dgauge7mz3nq6hg","Capacity Rightsizing Intelligence","capacity-rightsizing-intelligence","Turn raw infrastructure metrics into a rightsizing and planning workflow.

## What it does
- Detects chronic over and under allocation patterns
- Produces rightsizing recommendations per VM and per cluster
- Builds rolling capacity forecasts (growth, saturation risk, headroom)

## Operating model
- A baseline phase to stabilize metrics and labels
- Regular review cadence for exceptions, approvals, and follow-through

## Best for
- Platform teams facing growth uncertainty
- Organizations needing consistent governance reporting

![Solution illustration](http://10.1.5.125:8080/uploads/solution_capacity_rightsizing_intelligence_e507e392a3.jpg)","2026-02-20T09:03:04.885Z","2026-02-21T23:05:48.839Z","2026-02-21T23:05:48.877Z","**Rightsizing and forecasting layer** for virtual infrastructure, turning telemetry into actionable capacity and utilization decisions.",{"id":380,"documentId":381,"name":382,"slug":383,"solution_type":49,"integration_patterns":50,"licensing_model":384,"description":385,"visibility_level":52,"workflow":38,"createdAt":386,"updatedAt":387,"publishedAt":388,"locale":42,"short_description":389},604,"fux42jfbdob0b78lpdo3h5rx","Observability and Cost Governance","observability-and-cost-governance","oss","Bring operations telemetry and cost governance into a single, repeatable management loop.

## What it covers
- KPI definition: performance, availability, utilization, saturation signals
- Alerting patterns and escalation logic
- Governance checks: tagging hygiene, anomaly detection, review cadence

## Outputs
- Executive-ready reporting and trend views
- Actionable backlogs for optimization and cleanup
- Continuous improvement rhythm for platform teams

## Best for
- Teams that already collect metrics but lack governance
- Organizations that need consistent reporting across stakeholders
